code:
import io
import string
import list

fn parse_ints(_ s: String) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  let n = string.len(s)
  mut i = 0
  mut cur = 0
  mut neg = false
  mut in_num = false
  while i < n
    match string.byte_at(s, i)
    when Some(b)
      if b >= 48 and b <= 57
        cur = cur * 10 + (b - 48)
        in_num = true
      else if b == 45 and not in_num
        neg = true
        in_num = true
      else
        if in_num
          if neg
            result = list.push(result, -cur)
          else
            result = list.push(result, cur)
          end
          cur = 0
          neg = false
          in_num = false
        end
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if in_num
    if neg
      result = list.push(result, -cur)
    else
      result = list.push(result, cur)
    end
  end
  result
end

fn sorted_insert(_ xs: List<Int>, _ x: Int) -> List<Int>
  mut tmp: List<Int> = []
  mut inserted = false
  for y in xs
    if not inserted and x < y
      tmp = list.push(tmp, x)
      inserted = true
    end
    tmp = list.push(tmp, y)
  end
  if not inserted
    tmp = list.push(tmp, x)
  end
  tmp
end

fn sort_list(_ xs: List<Int>) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  for x in xs
    result = sorted_insert(result, x)
  end
  result
end

fn intersect_unique(_ a: List<Int>, _ b: List<Int>) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  for x in a
    if list.contains(b, x) and not list.contains(result, x)
      result = list.push(result, x)
    end
  end
  result
end

let line1 = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let line2 = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let a = parse_ints(line1)
let b = parse_ints(line2)
let inter = intersect_unique(a, b)
let result = sort_list(inter)

if result.len() == 0
  println("empty")
else
  mut out = ""
  mut first = true
  for x in result
    if first
      out = "#{x}"
      first = false
    else
      out = "#{out} #{x}"
    end
  end
  println(out)
end
